form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 6th (Sr3) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 7th-11.4 beaten 15 m by Letsgo Matilda (2:11.50) in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $10. At the previous start 9th (Sr4) over 1720m at Young beaten 50 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $19. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 1760m at Junee was 3rd-6.2 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Sokys Falcon (2:10.80) in NR 40 to 48 on March 31 at $1.70. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1720m at Young was 4th-4.7 at the bell, beaten 2.75 m by Peaksart (2:09.20) in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $3.40. Capable of playing a major role.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1660m after showing early speed at Parkes, beaten 9 m by Chillax (2:03.70) in NR 39 to 42 on April 4 at $26. At the run before 7th (Fr2) over 1720m after showing early speed at this track was 7th-10.7 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Burrabadine Bullet (2:05.80) in NR 40 to 45 on March 15 at $9.50. Place hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Lucky Punt at Bathurst over 1730m in a NR up to 47 on April 1 at $41. Raced better the start before that where he won by 2.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Young (2:09.20) beating Tigernator in NR 38 to 39 on March 24 at $3.10 at the bell was leading 0.2. Rates highly. Should be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in after the start and tightened the racing room of Phantom Star.
Inconvenienced passing the 1500m as a result of Itz Bad breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 1635m after showing early speed at Temora was 6th-10.7 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $14. At his previous start 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst was 4th-7.64 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Lucky Punt (2:04.50) in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $19. Finds a nice race and can improve.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr3) over 1660m after showing early pace at Parkes beaten 30 m by Riverina Flash (2:01.60) in NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $10. Forward performance expected.

Checked and galloped racing around the first turn when Centrefire galloped.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Parkes on April 4. Before that, 8th (Sr2) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 18 m by Hall Most An Angel (2:08.50) in NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $3.40. Rates well on best form and worth including.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr1) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 60 m by Memphis Fury (2:06.70) in NR 46 to 48 on March 27 at $4.20. Two runs back 6th (Fr3) over 1730m at Bathurst, at the bell was 7th-14.9m 2WWC beaten 8 m by She Maybe Bettor (2:07.40) in NR up to 48 on July 2 at $10. Watch for a spike in form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up rounding the home turn and in the early part of the straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1635m after racing wide at Temora, beaten 30 m by Oak Ridge (2:00.30) in NR 42 to 48 on April 6 at $71. Before that was well back in the run when 5th (Fr5) over 2170m at Junee was 7th-13.6 at the bell, beaten 18 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $26. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Backing up quickly since being well beaten Parkes over 1660m, 6 days ago and two back 7th (Sr1) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway was 7th-13.1 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Betterthantheboyz (2:45.90) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $51. Not keen.
